surfaces.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-200 z-50 sticky top-0

components.buttons: rounded-md font-medium px-4 py-2 inline-flex items-center justify-center transition-all
components.data_tables: Use Shadcn Table. Ensure header row has distinct background (bg-zinc-50) and bottom border.
components.badges: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold border
components.inputs: Use Shadcn Input. Border zinc-200, focus ring blue-600.

login_background.description: Minimalist high-end hotel reception abstract photography for auth screens

id_scan_illustration.description: Abstract illustration representing biometric ID scanning

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: NOTE: The stack uses .js files, NOT .tsx. Configure shadcn and components for .jsx / .js syntax.
Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts sonner date-fns react-webcam
Install shadcn components: button, card, input, table, badge, dialog, tabs, calendar, popover, select, dropdown-menu.
Typography Setup: Add 'Cabinet Grotesk' (headings) and 'IBM Plex Sans' (body) imports to index.css and update tailwind.config.js.
Layout Approach: Apply the 'Control Room' grid (Mode B) for dashboard screens. Data views should feel dense but orderly. Max border radius is 8px.

ID Scanning Feature: Use the 'react-webcam' library. Implement a UI overlay over the video feed to guide the passport/ID alignment. MOCK the actual scanning backend if necessary, but provide the realistic scanning UI.
Accounting/Expenses Module: Render structured Shadcn data tables. Categorize spending visually (Gardening, Pool Service, Hedge Trimming, Repairs) using distinct icons or badge colors.
Navigation: Ensure a permanent, sticky navigation header or sidebar.
Testing: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements, e.g., data-testid='camera-scan-button', data-testid='check-in-submit', etc.
Data Inputs: NEVER use raw HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Always use Shadcn Select and Shadcn Calendar components.
UI Exports: Ensure 'Export PDF' and 'Export Excel' buttons are present in the Accounting and Bookings sections. They can trigger Sonner toast messages indicating mock download.
